overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic, upscale interior lobby. The character walks through a modern corridor with metallic columns and linear lighting, turns around at the far end, and enters a side room with distinctive hexagonal wall paneling.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale building lobby with seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor away from the camera's starting position

notable_agents.action: seated on a bench looking at a handheld device

long rectangular LED light fixtures arranged in parallel rows overhead
tall decorative plant with red leaves in a large white planter
vertical framed poster with abstract artwork on the left wall
tall glass wall section with vertical illumination strips

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through a spacious, modern lobby with polished marble floors and linear overhead lighting. A large metal column stands to the left while a seated NPC rests on a bench to the right. The environment features clean, futuristic architecture with red accent plants and glass partitions.

events.description: character reaches the corridor end and executes a 180-degree turn to walk back

agents.ego_description: turning around at the corridor terminus and walking back toward the starting area

notable_agents.action: seated on a bench along the left wall

entered.detail: dark recessed doorway with a small sign at the end of the hall

segments.scene_description: After reaching the corridor's end, the character turns around and walks back. The perspective shifts, placing the metal column on the right and revealing the doorway that marks the corridor terminus. The seated NPC is now on the left side as the character returns toward the lobby entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: private reception room with hexagonal wall design

events.description: character turns right and enters the side room with distinctive gold-trimmed hexagonal walls

agents.ego_description: turning right into the side room and approaching the reception desk area

notable_agents.action: standing near the reception desk inside the room

entered.detail: wall covered in gold-trimmed hexagonal panels with integrated lighting
tall illuminated glass case containing a white sculptural object
curved white reception counter with computer terminals

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and enters a side room featuring distinctive hexagonal wall paneling with gold accents. Inside, a glass display case stands to the left while a reception desk occupies the far end. An NPC stands near the desk as the character enters the more intimate, warmly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a spacious, futuristic lobby that transitions into a more intimate, warmly lit side room. It begins with the character walking forward across polished marble floors beneath linear overhead lighting, passing a large metal column and a seated NPC amidst clean architecture and red accent plants. As the character reaches the end of the corridor, the perspective shifts during a turnaround, repositioning the column and the NPC as the camera tracks back toward the lobby entrance. The scene then turns right, moving away from the open hall and entering a side room characterized by distinctive hexagonal wall paneling with gold accents. Finally, the camera glides past a glass display case toward a reception desk where an NPC stands, completing the shift from the expansive lobby to the detailed interior of the office.
